flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lewis & Clark College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($57.4k → $64.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lewis & Clark College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($57.4k → $64.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lewis & Clark College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Lewis & Clark College are 43% above 6-year earnings ($43.6k → $62.2k).
